testPageIconSlugItems.details: Test page now contains 2 new demo containers with 16 items that use iconSlug exclusively (no logoId). Container 1: 'IconPicker Slugs - All 12 Icons' with all 12 slugs (bluesky, facebook, facebook-alt, imdb, instagram, linkedin, pinterest, threads, tiktok, vimeo, x, youtube). Container 2: 'IconPicker Slugs - Icons Only (showLabel=false)' with 4 items (instagram, x, youtube, tiktok) and showLabel=false. Raw content confirmed via taktician_wp_raw_content. Total block instances now 11 (up from 9).

iconSlugPhpRendering.details: The iconSlug PHP path is confirmed to execute and render correctly on the frontend. Rendered HTML analysis shows 16 icon spans with clean SVG output (no XML declaration artifact) — these are the 16 new iconSlug items. The SVG elements start directly with <svg xmlns=...> confirming file_get_contents from resources/ is working and no XML declaration is present in the resource files. Sample rendered output: '<svg xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg" viewBox="0 0 25 24">...' (clean, no XML PI).

iconSlugDefaultNull.details: iconSlug attribute in block.json now has 'default': null at line 29, matching logoId's default:null. block.json now reads: {"iconSlug": {"type": "string", "default": null}}. FQA-003 resolved.

logoIdBackwardCompat.details: All 9 original logoId-based test page variations continue to render correctly. 31 icon spans with logoId-path SVG output (with pre-existing XML declaration artifact from theme_output_svg_or_img — not a regression). Page audit shows sections 2-10 match expected link counts: 2, 4, 8, 3, 3, 1, 4, 3, 3 links respectively. Icon spans, label spans, and anchors all present as expected.

validateAll.details: taktician_validate_all passed with 0 errors. Warnings are pre-existing react-hooks/exhaustive-deps in unrelated blocks (Accordion, Archive, ContentWithMedia, FullWidthMedia, PostHero, Tabs) and expected root-wrapper-element warnings for the WideSocialMedia block (TSX uses editor-only BlockControls/InspectorControls as outermost element; PHP correctly uses <li>/<aside> for frontend). No new issues introduced.

showLabelFalseWithIconSlug.details: Section index 1 (IconPicker Slugs - Icons Only, showLabel=false) has 4 icon spans, 0 label spans — labels correctly hidden. Icon spans still present and rendered. Confirms iconSlug path works correctly in conjunction with showLabel=false context.

resolvedIssues.resolution: Two new demo containers added: 'IconPicker Slugs - All 12 Icons' (12 iconSlug items covering every supported slug) and 'IconPicker Slugs - Icons Only (showLabel=false)' (4 iconSlug items with labels hidden). PHP file_get_contents path verified to produce clean SVG output on the frontend. Total test page block instances increased from 9 to 11.
iconSlug attribute in WideSocialMediaItem/block.json now has 'default': null, consistent with logoId.

openIssues.description: XML declaration from media library SVGs still appears as <!--?xml version="1.0" encoding="UTF-8"?--> in rendered HTML when using the logoId fallback path (31 spans affected). This is a pre-existing behavior of theme_output_svg_or_img, not a regression of this change. The new iconSlug path does not have this issue. Not in scope for this fix cycle.

passedChecks: Test page now has 16 items using iconSlug with no logoId
All 12 iconSlug resource SVG files render via file_get_contents — output is clean SVG with no XML declaration
showLabel=false works correctly with iconSlug items (icons show, labels hidden)
iconSlug attribute has default:null in block.json (consistent with logoId)
All 9 original logoId variations still render correctly (backward compat)
Build passes, lint passes, sync passes, registration passes (taktician_validate_all: 0 errors)
11 total block instances, all in DemoContainers, correct structure
